method: Independent walkthrough of the review report; verified its evidence table against orchestrator-held facts (private repo confirmed via gh repo view --json visibility; disk free 6.09-6.35 GB decimal range across measurements; .gitignore coverage; absence of .github/src).

scenario_results.note: Every bootstrap element judged with verified evidence; E3/E4 correctly found the missing blocker records
Disk verdict quantified: floor respected, true discretionary headroom ~1.9 GB < nominal 2 GB budget
Contradictions C1-C7 cited to document and section

orchestrator_dispositions.C1_unrecorded_blockers: Fixed: B-001 (Supabase token), B-002 (Render), B-003 (Vercel), B-004 (Geoclient key) created before this gate was recorded.
orchestrator_dispositions.C2_ledger_only_local: Fixed in bootstrap follow-up commit + push.
orchestrator_dispositions.C4_C5_evidence_quality: Adopted as standing requirements for future tasks.
orchestrator_dispositions.C6_no_task_branches: Accepted for read-only bootstrap tasks; branch/worktree convention becomes mandatory when writing tasks start (monorepo skeleton onward).
orchestrator_dispositions.C7_producer_outputs: Adopted: producer reports must embed actual outputs.
orchestrator_dispositions.recommended_tasks: M0-T004..M0-T010 recommendations accepted; blocker/state/ledger items already executed by orchestrator; remaining items registered as new tasks.
